label: other_startup_founders
description: Illustrative Tier 3 examples for startup founders whose companies are not clearly devtools or AI. Team size, funding, customers, or employee count can raise confidence, but more than 10 employees is not a hard scoring gate. These are grounding examples, not scoring rules.
examples: founder of a vertical SaaS startup with 25 employees
co-founder of a B2B workflow product with 40 employees
technical founder of a fintech startup with 18 employees
founder of a marketplace software company with 30 employees
CTO/co-founder of a startup with operating traction and unclear devtools or AI positioning
notes: Use the Tier 3 scoring rules in icp_spec.json first.
Tier 3 is still founder-led startup fit; non-founder roles belong in tier 0 unless they match Tier 2.
Do not assign tier 3 without employee-count evidence over 10.
